name: education_policy_recall_notice_arrives_southport_lib_eq
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Education Policy, the situation tagged internally around education policy recall notice arrives southport lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The trade is not abstract: it is liberty versus equality under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Omar Hughes
agents.identity: I am Omar Hughes, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Education Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Luc Patel
agents.identity: I am Luc Patel, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Education Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so equality does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so liberty does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Omar Hughes must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Omar Hughes do?
